NAT Redirect/Port Forward to Pihole (Must be top rule)
Block all non-Pihole DNS traffic
Redirect WAN traffic to VPN (place below LAN rule)
Default allow LAN to any rule

alias.name: DuckDNS
alias.address: duckdns.org ns1.duckdns.org ns2.duckdns.org ns3.duckdns.org ns5.duckdns.org ns6.duckdns.org ns4.duckdns.org

alias.name: local_network
alias.descr: Entire local network all VLANS excluding work

alias.name: pfB_DNSBL_Ports
alias.detail: DO NOT EDIT THIS PORT||DO NOT EDIT THIS PORT

alias.name: pfB_PRI1_v4
alias.url:
http://127.0.0.1:80/pfblockerng/pfblockerng.php?pfb=pfB_PRI1_v4
[ Abuse_Feodo_C2_v4, Abuse_SSLBL_v4, CINS_army_v4, ET_Block_v4, ET_Comp_v4, ISC_Block_v4, Spamhaus_Drop_v4, Spamhaus_eDrop_v4, Talos_BL_v4 ]

alias.name: work_devices
alias.detail: Percy Work||Justin Work||Marcus Work Router||Marcus Work Thing?

alias.name: WORK_QUARANTINE
alias.descr: Disallow work network from communicating with rest of LAN

revision.description: admin@192.168.8.2 (Local Database): Firewall: NAT: Outbound - reordered outbound mappings.

package.name: WireGuard

config.description: ADs Basic - Collection of ADvertisement Domain Feeds.
ADs - Collection of ADvertisement Domain Feeds.
EasyList Feeds - Utilizing only the domains which are listed to be blocked in full.
PRI1 - Collection of Feeds from the most reputable blocklist providers. (Primary tier)
PRI5 - Collection of Feeds from Fifth Tier providers.
